purpose: Report-only guardrail policy for deciding whether a future WellFit agent may attempt a narrowly scoped automatic repair of failed validation checks. This policy does not enable or perform repairs, merges, deployments, or product/runtime changes.
safeRepairCategories: JSON formatting or parse error in project-register docs/register files
missing TODO_INDEX pointer for newly added governance doc
missing WORK_MAP pointer for newly added governance register
missing KI-Fortsetzungs-Prompt in newly added architecture doc

requiredEvidence: diff limited to whitespace-only markdown cleanup

allowedFailureTypes.category: JSON formatting or parse error in project-register docs/register files
requiredEvidence: failing jq or JSON parse output

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing TODO_INDEX pointer for newly added governance doc
requiredEvidence: TODO_INDEX entry pointing to existing leading file

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing WORK_MAP pointer for newly added governance register
requiredEvidence: WORK_MAP entry pointing to existing register and architecture note

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing KI-Fortsetzungs-Prompt in newly added architecture doc

requiredEvidence: quality-gate failed check or step log

forbiddenFailureTypes: Firebase Functions failure requiring code changes
dependency install, upgrade, downgrade, or lockfile repair
security, privacy, legal, compliance, child-safety, health, location, payment, token, NFT, wallet, betting, reward authority, or mission completion authority failure
test failure with ambiguous root cause
build failure that requires changing app/**, components/**, lib/**, functions/**, firestore.rules, native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR/**, package.json, or package-lock.json
any failure after maxRepairAttempts is reached
stopConditions: failure does not match exactly one allowedFailureTypes entry
failure touches or appears to require a forbiddenRepairPaths path
failure touches or appears to require a forbiddenRepairTopics topic
required evidence is missing or ambiguous
repair would modify runtime product code or protected compliance/product logic
repair would require package.json or package-lock.json without explicit approval
repair would require dependency installation or network-dependent package changes
repair would require merge, deploy, branch rewrite, rebase, force-push, or PR #13 action
the same failure persists after maxRepairAttempts
new failure appears after a repair attempt
human reviewer requests stop or the agent cannot explain the root cause
requiredEvidence: exact failed check name or parser error
post-repair command result if a future approved repair mode ever exists
human review note for any ineligible or stopped condition
